caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot and curls sits in a studio setting for a podcast. She wears a dark green t-shirt featuring a red circular logo and a watch on her left wrist. She is positioned behind a black professional microphone mounted on a stand. In the background, a black banner displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "It's A M-unique Hustle," along with a graphic of a man. A small logo reading "BOSS TALK 101" is also visible in the bottom left corner of the frames. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated, listening intently. She begins by looking slightly to her right with a thoughtful expression, resting her chin on her hand. As the scene progresses, she shifts her gaze downward and closes her eyes momentarily, maintaining a pensive and focused demeanor.
